tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
In seq.py, last(xs) raises IndexError because it uses xs[len(xs)] (off by one). Fix it to return the last element.
In mathx.py, double(x) computes x * 2 but never returns it (returns None). Add the missing return.
In counts.py, get_count(d, k) raises KeyError when k is absent. Make it return 0 for missing keys.
